projectDescription: MCP server for fetching, indexing, and searching documentation with semantic vector search capabilities.
keyFeatures: Version-specific documentation indexing from web, GitHub, npm, PyPI, and local files
Semantic vector search using OpenAI, Gemini, Azure, AWS, and Ollama embeddings
Model Context Protocol (MCP) server with stdio and HTTP transports
CLI tool with commands for scraping, searching, and managing documentation
Web interface for managing indexed documentation libraries
Distributed deployment with separate coordinator and worker processes
Asynchronous job processing with recovery and real-time event updates
Rich file format support including HTML, Markdown, PDF, Word, Excel, PowerPoint, and source code
publicApiSurface: scrape - Index documentation from URL, local path, or package registry
search - Search indexed documentation with semantic and keyword search
list - List all indexed libraries and versions
remove - Remove library or specific version from index
refresh - Re-index documentation for a specific version
listLibraries - MCP tool to list all indexed libraries
findVersion - MCP tool to find library version information
scrapeTool - MCP tool to scrape and index documentation
searchTool - MCP tool to search indexed documentation
fetchUrl - MCP tool to fetch and convert URL content to markdown
cancelJob - MCP tool to cancel running jobs
getJobInfo - MCP tool to get job status information
listJobs - MCP tool to list all jobs
